tasks.description: In src/shared/hooks/useUserUIState.ts: add `defaultTool: { toolId: string }` to the `UISettings` interface (~line 42); add a `decodeDefaultTool(value, fallback)` helper alongside other decode* functions (~line 179) that returns `{ toolId: readString(record?.toolId, fallback.toolId) }`; add a `case 'defaultTool':` branch to `normalizeUserUISetting` (~line 205). No migration needed (JSONB column with auto-backfill).

In src/shared/lib/tooling/toolManifest.ts (~line 102): change the `videoEditorSettings` entry's `paneSection` from `'assistant'` to `'main'`. ToolsPane.tsx already partitions by paneSection — no other wiring needed.

Create new file src/shared/lib/tooling/toolEligibility.ts exporting `isToolEligible(tool, ctx)` where `ctx = { currentEnv, isCloudGenerationEnabled, isLoadingGenerationMethods }`. Mirror the exact logic currently inlined at ToolsPane.tsx:265-278: DEV env → always true; `character-animate` → env check AND (`isLoadingGenerationMethods` OR `isCloudGenerationEnabled`); otherwise → `tool.environments.includes(currentEnv)`. Then refactor `ToolsPane.isToolVisible` to delegate to this helper (no behavior change).

Create new file src/app/DefaultToolRedirect.tsx. Component should: (a) call `useUserUIState('defaultTool', { toolId: 'travel-between-images' })`; (b) call `useUserUIState('generationMethods', { onComputer: true, inCloud: true })`; (c) while either is loading, render `<ReighLoading />`; (d) once loaded, look up the stored toolId in `toolRuntimeManifest` — if missing OR `isToolEligible` returns false for current env/cloud state, fall back to `'travel-between-images'`; otherwise use the stored id; (e) render `<Navigate to={`/tools/${resolvedToolId}`} replace />`. CRITICAL: do NOT call `update()` to repair stale ids — the 200ms debounce + unmount-clear in useUserUIState would drop the write. Stored value must be preserved so gated tools re-activate when the gate re-opens.

In src/app/routes.tsx: (a) change the `/tools` route (~line 127-130) from `loader: () => redirect('/tools/travel-between-images')` to `element: <DefaultToolRedirect />` so it stays inside `<Layout>` with auth + hooks available; (b) change the PWA `/` redirect (~line 123-126) similarly to render `<DefaultToolRedirect />`; (c) change `authRedirectLoader` (~line 57) to `redirect('/tools')` instead of `redirect('/tools/travel-between-images')`. Funnels all landing paths through the preference-aware component.

In src/shared/components/ToolsPane/ToolsPane.tsx: (a) import `Home` from `lucide-react` (~line 13); (b) lift the default-tool hook into `ToolsPaneComponent` next to `generationMethods` (~line 228): `const { value: defaultTool, update: updateDefaultTool } = useUserUIState('defaultTool', { toolId: 'travel-between-images' });`; (c) thread `isDefault: boolean` and `onSetDefault: () => void` props into `ToolCard` (~line 24-29), passing them from BOTH the Main Tools and Assistant Tools loops; (d) render the home button inside the card's flex row near the existing current-indicator dot (~line 109-112) — `<Home className="w-4 h-4 fill-current" />` when `isDefault`, `<Home className="w-4 h-4 text-zinc-500" />` otherwise. CRITICAL event wiring (because ToolCard navigates on `onPointerUp`, not `onClick`): the button MUST stop propagation on `onPointerDown`, `onPointerUp` (this is what actually prevents navigation), AND `onClick`. The `onSetDefault()` call goes inside `onPointerUp`. Button needs `type="button"`, `aria-label` and `title` reflecting current state ('Default landing tool' / 'Set as default landing tool').

Run tsc --noEmit and lint. Run any existing tests touching useUserUIState or ToolsPane (e.g., useUserUIState.test, ToolsPane.test) — update snapshots if ToolCard's prop shape change broke them. Then perform manual dev-server smoke test of all four scenarios: (a) video-editor appears under 'Main Tools'; (b) clicking the home icon on a non-default tool does NOT navigate, only highlights the icon; (c) reload the app — lands on the chosen tool; (d) set default to character-animate, toggle off cloud generation, reload — lands on travel-between-images without crashing AND the stored value is NOT overwritten (re-enabling cloud restores character-animate landing). If any test or scenario fails, diagnose, fix, and re-run until passing.

Run tests relevant to the changed files to verify correctness and check for regressions — run the full test file/module, not just individual functions. Find and run the project's existing test suite — do NOT create new test files. If any test fails, read the error, fix the code, and re-run until all tests pass.

watch_items: Home button event wiring: must stop propagation on onPointerDown + onPointerUp + onClick because ToolCard navigates on onPointerUp, not onClick. Stopping only onClick will let the press fall through and navigate.

DO NOT call updateDefaultTool() from DefaultToolRedirect to 'repair' stale ids. useUserUIState.update is 200ms debounced with unmount-clear (useUserUIState.ts:447,470-477), so the write would be dropped as the redirect navigates away. Fall back at runtime only.
Gated-off tools (env-gated or cloud-mode-gated character-animate) MUST keep their stored preference so the default re-activates when the gate re-opens. Never overwrite.
DefaultToolRedirect must use the SAME isToolEligible predicate that ToolsPane.isToolVisible uses — the new shared helper exists specifically to prevent drift.
Loaders are synchronous and cannot await Supabase reads, so the redirect must be a React component mounted under <Layout>, not a route loader.
React Router: ensure the new <DefaultToolRedirect /> sits inside the layout route so useUserUIState's auth context and hooks are available.
Backwards compatibility: users with no stored defaultTool preference must still land on travel-between-images (the fallback in the hook default).
Home button universal across both Main and Assistant tool sections per assumption #1 — assistant tools are still eligible to be set as default.
Don't add a Supabase migration — users.settings is JSONB and useUserUIState handles backfill on first read.
Brief <ReighLoading /> flash during the Supabase fetch is acceptable per the assumptions; matches existing lazy-load UX.

sense_checks.question: Does UISettings include `defaultTool: { toolId: string }`, is `decodeDefaultTool` defined alongside other decode* helpers, and does `normalizeUserUISetting` have a `case 'defaultTool':` branch that delegates to it?
Is `videoEditorSettings.paneSection` set to `'main'` in toolManifest.ts, and does video-editor render under the 'Main Tools' section in ToolsPane at runtime?

Does the new `isToolEligible` helper exactly mirror the env + cloud-mode logic previously inlined at ToolsPane.tsx:265-278, and does `ToolsPane.isToolVisible` now delegate to it without behavior change?

Does DefaultToolRedirect use both the defaultTool and generationMethods hooks, gate on isLoading, validate via toolRuntimeManifest AND isToolEligible, fall back to travel-between-images on miss, and never call update() to rewrite the stored preference?

Are all three landing entry points (`/`, `/tools`, and `authRedirectLoader`) routed through DefaultToolRedirect (or `/tools`), with no remaining hardcoded `/tools/travel-between-images` outside the fallback?

Does the home button stop propagation on onPointerDown, onPointerUp, AND onClick (not just onClick), call onSetDefault from onPointerUp, render filled when isDefault and muted otherwise, and appear on every ToolCard in both Main and Assistant sections with correct aria-label/title?

Did tsc/lint/tests pass and did all four manual smoke scenarios behave correctly — especially (d) where setting character-animate as default, disabling cloud, and reloading falls back without overwriting the stored preference?
Did the verification tests pass? Were any regressions found and fixed?

meta_commentary: Two surgical changes wired through the existing useUserUIState pattern. Three subtle traps drove the plan revisions and remain the highest-risk areas during execution: (1) ToolCard navigates on onPointerUp, so the home button's event guard must cover pointer events, not just click — get this wrong and clicking the home icon will both set the default AND navigate away. (2) useUserUIState.update is debounced and cleared on unmount, so DefaultToolRedirect must NEVER attempt to repair stale stored ids — the write would be silently dropped. Fall back at runtime only. (3) Sidebar visibility is narrower than manifest membership (env + cloud-mode gate for character-animate), so the redirect must use the same predicate — Step 3 extracts isToolEligible into a shared module specifically to prevent drift between sidebar and redirect. Execution order: T1+T2+T3 are independent and can land in parallel; T4 depends on T1+T3; T5 depends on T4; T6 depends on T1; T7 verifies everything. The loader→component conversion in T5 is necessary because React Router loaders are synchronous and can't await Supabase reads. Don't add a Supabase migration — the JSONB column handles new keys via existing backfill.

plan_steps_covered.plan_step_summary: Step 1: Add defaultTool key + decoder + normalize branch to useUserUIState
Step 2: Promote video-editor paneSection from 'assistant' to 'main' in toolManifest
Step 3: Extract isToolEligible into shared module and refactor ToolsPane.isToolVisible to delegate
Step 4: Create DefaultToolRedirect component (no repair-write, uses isToolEligible)
Step 5: Wire /tools, /, and authRedirectLoader through DefaultToolRedirect
Step 6: Add home-button UI to ToolCard with correct pointer-event handling
Step 7: Verification — tsc/lint, unit tests, manual smoke test of four scenarios

validation.completeness_notes: Every plan step maps 1:1 to a finalize task. Execution order matches the plan's stated ordering (parallel-capable T1/T2/T3, then T4 depending on T1+T3, then T5 depending on T4, T6 depending on T1, and T7 verifying everything).
